questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '6df02ad0-5a0f-4ace-b069-e944e2b04b81' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '53f0ffea-9fc3-4ea8-a598-f621b65d1587'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '6df02ad0-5a0f-4ace-b069-e944e2b04b81'; delete from question_items where id = '6df02ad0-5a0f-4ace-b069-e944e2b04b81';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
